data.description:
The development server emits a warning about cross-origin requests from 127.0.0.1 to /_next/* resources. Next.js requires explicit configuration of `allowedDevOrigins` in next.config.js to allow development-time requests from different origins. Without this configuration, a future major version of Next.js will block these requests entirely.

Reference: https://nextjs.org/docs/app/api-reference/config/next-config-js/allowedDevOrigins
